subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。左右の小指の輪に親指を下から入れ、小指手前と人差し指向こうの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Begin in Opening A. Insert both thumbs from below into the little-finger loops and pick up from below the near little-finger strings and the far index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指と中指を、親指の輪に上から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both index and middle fingers from above into the thumb loops.

subtitle.ja: 親指下にかかっている親指同士を繋いでいる糸を人差し指と中指で挟んで引き出します。糸は人差し指にかかります
subtitle.en: With the index and middle fingers, grasp the string that passes under the thumbs and links them, draw it out, and let it fall onto the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から、一番下の輪だけを残して上2つの輪を外します
subtitle.en: From both thumbs, release the upper two loops and retain only the lowest loop.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指のねじれを無くすように、親指を向こう側に向けます
subtitle.en: Turn both thumbs away from you to remove the twists on the thumb loops.

subtitle.ja: 右親指の輪に左親指を入れます
subtitle.en: Insert the left thumb into the right-thumb loop.

subtitle.ja: 右親指の糸を外し、左親指の2本の輪に右親指を入れて広げます
subtitle.en: Release the right-thumb loop, insert the right thumb into the two left-thumb loops, and open them.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の背で小指向こうの糸を取り、親指の輪から引き出します。親指の腹にかかっていた2本の糸は自然に外れます
subtitle.en: With the backs of both thumbs, move over and pick down the far little-finger strings and draw them out of the thumb loops; the two strings lying on the thumb pads fall away naturally.

subtitle.ja: 親指の輪に、左右の小指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both little fingers from below into the thumb loops.

subtitle.ja: 反対側の手で、親指手前の糸の下から小指の糸を掴み、親指手前の糸を超えて小指にかけます
subtitle.en: With the opposite hand, take the little-finger string from below the near thumb string, move over the near thumb string, and place it onto the little finger.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release the thumb strings from both hands.

subtitle.ja: 小指の糸を引き下げて握ります
subtitle.en: Pull down the little-finger strings and grasp them.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指から、上の糸を残したまま下の糸だけを外します。中央上部の2本の糸を引き出して完成です
subtitle.en: From both index fingers, release only the lower strings while retaining the upper strings; draw out the two central upper strings to show the finished figure.
